StmtSimple.StatementText: SELECT MIN(lt.link) AS link_type, MIN(t1.title) AS first_movie, MIN(t2.title) AS second_movie FROM job.keyword AS k, job.link_type AS lt, job.movie_keyword AS mk, job.movie_link AS ml, job.title AS t1, job.title AS t2 WHERE k.keyword ='10,000-mile-club' AND mk.keyword_id = k.id AND t1.id = mk.movie_id AND ml.movie_id = t1.id AND ml.linked_movie_id = t2.id AND lt.id = ml.link_type_id AND mk.movie_id = t1.id
